title: calcearia epiphytica
intro: Calcearia epiphytica, also known as Epigaea regens or Calceolaria epiphytica, is a flowering plant species in the Calceolaria family. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America and is known for its medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Herbal preparations of Calcearia epiphytica include infusions and tinctures that can be used to treat these conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
